stemHtml: After a clear, freezing cold night, what might the flight crew be expected to observe on arrival at the aircraft, parked outside, prior to an early morning flight?

options.a: The aircraft is likely to be covered in a hard layer of rime ice due to vapour sublimation.
options.b: The sub-zero air temperature has probably created supercooled water droplets, which have formed clear ice on the aircraft.
options.c: The convective cooling of the surface air sitting on the land overnight could lead to vapour sublimation on the fuselage.
options.d: The overnight radiative cooling of the land and fuselage surface may have caused hoar frost to form, covering the aircraft.
